title: Cuneiform Tablet #0775: Neo-Babylonian Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
